name: Next.js Starter
description: Perfect for building full-stack web apps. OpenClaw excels at creating pages, API routes, and components from scratch.

name: FastAPI
description: Build REST APIs in minutes. OpenClaw can scaffold endpoints, models, and database schemas with a single prompt.

name: shadcn/ui
description: Beautiful copy-paste components. Tell OpenClaw what UI you want and it assembles shadcn components into full pages.

name: Langchain
description: Build AI chains and agents. OpenClaw can write complex RAG pipelines, tool integrations, and multi-step chains.

name: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative. OpenClaw sets up auth, database tables, RLS policies, and edge functions seamlessly.

name: Turborepo
description: Monorepo tooling. OpenClaw navigates multi-package repos with ease — editing across apps and packages in one session.

name: Prisma
description: Type-safe database ORM. OpenClaw generates schemas, migrations, and queries that just work with your database.

name: Hono
description: Ultrafast web framework for the edge. Small API surface makes it easy for OpenClaw to build and deploy workers.

name: tRPC
description: End-to-end typesafe APIs. OpenClaw writes routers and procedures with full type inference across client and server.

name: Scrapy
description: Web scraping framework. Let OpenClaw write spiders, pipelines, and data parsers for any website in minutes.
